insights.message: Your side income this month is looking great. If you keep this up, it could cover 60% of your Laptop goal by next week.
You've spent more on Food this week than your usual average. Consider meal prepping or cooking at home for the next few days to stay on track with your budget.
You have Rp 500.000 sitting in your main wallet untouched for 14 days. Moving this to a "Pocket" could earn you minor interest.
